welcome.tagline: Fast, secure cross-border payments powered by Stellar blockchain
welcome.feature_instant_desc: Send money across Africa in seconds
welcome.feature_multi_desc: NGN, GHS, KES, USD and more

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join millions sending money across Africa
register.success: Account created! Your wallet is ready.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your AfriPay account

passwordReset.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link if an account exists.
passwordReset.forgot_success_toast: Check your email for the next steps.
passwordReset.reset_subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
passwordReset.reset_success_toast: Password updated. You can sign in now.
passwordReset.missing_token: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new one from the login page.
passwordReset.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.no_transactions: No transactions yet. Send your first payment!

send.title: Send Money
send.qr_invalid: Invalid Stellar address in QR code
send.qr_hint: Point at a Stellar address QR code
send.camera_permission_denied: Camera access denied. Please check your permissions.
send.camera_not_found: No camera found on this device
send.memo_placeholder: Payment note, numeric ID, or 64-char hex…
send.memo_hint_id: Unsigned 64-bit integer as digits only (exchange deposit IDs).
send.memo_hint_return: Exactly 64 hexadecimal characters for a return memo.

auth.pin_create_desc: Create a 4-6 digit PIN to authorize payments
auth.pin_mismatch_error: PINs do not match. Try again.
auth.pin_warning: Remember your PIN. You cannot recover it.
auth.pin_max_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
auth.pin_security_note: Your PIN is never sent to or stored on our servers

receive.title: Receive Money
receive.subtitle: Share your wallet address or QR code to receive payments
receive.warning: Only send XLM or Stellar-based assets to this address
